name: Crypto Info Applet
description: Get real-time crypto prices and DeFi insights.

get_price.title: Get Coin Price
get_price.description: Get the current USD price for a cryptocurrency by CoinGecko ID.

get_top_gainers.title: Top Gainers
get_top_gainers.description: Get the top 5 gainers by 24h price change.

get_top_losers.title: Top Losers
get_top_losers.description: Get the top 5 losers by 24h price change.

get_global_market_data.title: Global Market Data
get_global_market_data.description: Get global cryptocurrency market stats like total market cap and volume.

get_gas_fees.title: Ethereum Gas Fees
get_gas_fees.description: Get current estimated Ethereum gas fees.

get_protocol_tvl.title: DeFi Protocol TVL
get_protocol_tvl.description: Get TVL data for a DeFi protocol.

get_token_tvl.title: Token TVL
get_token_tvl.description: Get total value locked for a token address.

get_token_supply.title: Token Supply
get_token_supply.description: Get circulating supply of a token by CoinGecko ID.

get_token_marketcap.title: Token Market Cap
get_token_marketcap.description: Get market capitalization of a token by CoinGecko ID.

get_volume_traded.title: Token Trading Volume
get_volume_traded.description: Get 24h trading volume of a token by CoinGecko ID.

get_price_chart.title: 7-Day Price Chart
get_price_chart.description: Get historical 7-day price chart data for a token by CoinGecko ID.

get_latest_news.title: Latest Crypto News
get_latest_news.description: Get recent news headlines from CryptoPanic.

get_trending_searches.title: Trending Coin Searches
get_trending_searches.description: Get top trending coin searches from CoinGecko.
